product_overview: Hairconnekt is a two-sided marketplace mobile application connecting independent hair service providers with clients, streamlining booking, payments, and business management for providers while offering clients a seamless way to find and book local hair professionals.
core_goals: Enable clients to easily discover, book, and pay for local hair services.
Provide providers with tools to manage their schedules, services, and finances efficiently.
Create a trusted platform with secure authentication and real-time availability.
Support providers in growing their client base through marketing features and portfolio management.
Facilitate communication and reviews to enhance user experience and trust.
key_features: Client Registration and Login with JWT Authentication.
Provider and Client distinct app features for discovery, booking, and management.
Service management for providers including CRUD operations and category listings.
Real-time calendar booking and availability management for providers.
In-app payments integration via Stripe for secure transactions.
Provider dashboard with analytics, financials, vouchers, and subscription plans.
In-app messaging between clients and providers.
Review and rating system for feedback.
Image upload for portfolios and service presentations.
user_flow_summary: Client registers or logs in securely.
Client searches and filters providers by style, availability, and location.
Client selects services and books appointments using real-time calendar.
Provider logs in and manages their service menu, availability, and portfolio.
Provider views analytics, earnings, and manages vouchers and subscriptions.
Both parties communicate via in-app messaging.
Clients write reviews after service completion.
validation_criteria: User authentication workflows function correctly (registration, login, token refresh, password change).
Providers can perform CRUD operations on their services and upload images successfully.
Clients can search, filter, and book services with correct availability and pricing.
Payments process securely and reflect in provider earnings dashboard.
Providers can view accurate analytics and financial data.
Subscription plans enforce limits and commission fees as specified.
In-app messaging and reviews work correctly and are stored reliably.

features.name: Auth
features.description: Authentication endpoints for user registration, login, and token management.

features.name: Services
features.description: Provider services management endpoints (CRUD) for the authenticated provider.

get.summary: List all services for the authenticated provider
